utility_evaluation.REASONING: 1) Count requested items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 7 items. 2) Check final package includes: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (partially: flight details with costs — has cost and route but lacks specific flight details like airline/times; however format asks 'flight details with costs'—arguably insufficient specificity), accommodation (has name, cost, duration — acceptable), activities (present but lacks costs; format requires selected activities with costs — not satisfied), additional_services (present with costs for insurance; solo_traveler_protection marked Included — acceptable), total_budget (present). 3) Fully specified per item: - destination: fully specified. - travel_dates: fully specified. - transportation: missing detailed flight info beyond route and cost; ambiguous if counts as fully specified; since format asks 'flight details with costs', this is insufficient. - accommodation: fully specified. - activities: missing costs, not fully specified. - additional_services: includes costs; acceptable. - total_budget: present. Therefore fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, additional_services, total_budget = 5. Total items = 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map only items explicitly present in the final package to their corresponding entries and ratings in the ground-truth. Destination: Barcelona, Spain maps to 'Barcelona, Spain' with rating 6. Transportation: flights are 'budget_airlines Economy Class' level (price €100 fits budget airline economy range €50-€150), so rating 10. Accommodation: 'Backpacker's Base Hostel' corresponds to 'Backpacker's Base' with rating 9. Activities: 'Montserrat mountain hiking' aligns with 'Hiking Expedition' (rating 10); 'City photography' aligns best with 'City Walking Tour' (photography-focused, rating 9); 'Vegan culinary exploration' aligns with 'Vegan Cooking Class' (rating 8). Additional services: 'travel_insurance' is not in ground-truth lists; 'solo_traveler_protection' also not listed. Thus we only rate items that exist in the ground-truth.
